'''''Bixby''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvette]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
During a hit and fade [[Battle in the Dellalt system|strike]] against an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy leaving the [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]] as part of a resupply operation ahead of a suspected Imperial offensive, [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] reported that the crew of ''Bixby'' wanted to defect. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hamo Blastwell]] and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] were scrambled to destroy the convoy, consisting of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] ''[[Arreis]]'', ''[[Orcim]]'', ''[[Esorp]]'', ''[[Nigiro]]'' and ''[[Murtceps]]'' while [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] guarded ''Bixby''. The [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transport]] [[Dagger (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|''Dagger'']] docked with the corvette and transferred an Alliance team to secure the ship. The Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Gorgon (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Gorgon'']] arrived too late to prevent the now captured ship from returning with the Alliance team. ''Bixby's''' commander, Captain [[Nogdra]], revealed that the Empire was planning a major offensive called [[Operation Strike Fear]], beginning in that system.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
